CustomField.formula: CASE( $Profile.Name, 'SDA Community User', (SDA_Record_Owner__c) , 'SDA Community User Readonly', (SDA_Record_Owner__c), 'New SDA Login Community User', (SDA_Record_Owner__c), 'SDA Login Community User', (SDA_Record_Owner__c), 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', (SDA_Record_Owner__c), 'SPL Community User', (Chase_Record_Owner__c) , 'SPL Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__c), 'SPL Login Community User', (Chase_Record_Owner__c), 'New SPL Login Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__c), 'SPL Login Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__c), 'Scotia Bank Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c) , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c), 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c), 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c), 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c), 'Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__c), 'Fairstone Community User', (Fairstone_Record_Owner__c), 'Fairstone Community User Readonly', (Fairstone_Record_Owner__c), 'Goeasy Community User', (Goeasy_Record_Owner__c), 'Goeasy Community User Readonly', (Goeasy_Record_Owner__c), 'Canadian Tire Community User', (Canadian_Tire_Record_Owner__c), 'Money Mart Community User', (Money_Mart_Record_Owner__c), 'Flexiti Community User', (Flexiti_Record_Owner__c), (Owner:User.Id))
CustomField.label: Insolvency Owner Id
